_meta.verifiedBy: DRAFT — not for engine use until verified post-Budget
_meta.notes: L4-8 skeleton. Do NOT import this bundle into the engine until status flips to 'verified'. The _pending_changes block below lists every rate change announced for 2027/28 that the verified bundle will need to reflect.

_pending_changes.topic: Pensions enter the estate for IHT
_pending_changes.source: Royal Assent March 2026 (originally announced Autumn Budget 2024)
_pending_changes.engineImpact: Materially changes ihtDynamic / ihtProjection / ihtDeltaPrePost2027. Already partially reflected in 2026 bundle as a forward-warning; full activation here.
_pending_changes.action: Set inheritanceTax.pensionsInEstate.active = true in the verified 2027 bundle.

_pending_changes.topic: BPR £1m cap carries over (already live from April 2026)
_pending_changes.source: Autumn Budget 2024 / Finance Act 2026 s65 sch12
_pending_changes.engineImpact: Already in UK-2026.1.1. Carries over unchanged.
Personal Allowance, basic-rate band, higher-rate band all remain at 2026/27 nominal values. Real-terms erosion via CPI.
_pending_changes.action: Copy income block from UK-2026.1.1 verbatim. Add personalAllowanceFrozenTo: 2030 in the new bundle's _meta.

_pending_changes.engineImpact: Reduces cash-ISA contribution headroom for users under 65. Already in UK-2026.1.1 as a forward-warning under allowancesAndReliefs.cashISACapUnder65From2027.
_pending_changes.action: Activate the cap in the verified bundle: set isaAllowance.cashCapUnder65.active = true.
Re-verify the entire bundle against the Budget statement using BUDGET-DAY-RUNBOOK.md. Update _correctionLog with every changed value.

income._DRAFT_NOTE: Do not fill in until post-Autumn-Budget-2026. Copy from UK-2026.1.1 then apply any announced changes.

inheritanceTax._DRAFT_NOTE: Activate pensionsInEstate from April 2027. Carry over BPR £1m cap. Carry over RNRB taper.

pensionsInEstate.note: Pensions enter the estate for IHT calculation under Finance Act 2026 changes — Royal Assent March 2026.

pension._DRAFT_NOTE: Carry over Annual Allowance, MPAA, LSA, LSDBA from UK-2026.1.1. State Pension rate updates per DWP September announcement.

capitalGainsTax._DRAFT_NOTE: Rates frozen at 18% / 24% per Oct 2024 changes — carry over.

nationalInsurance._DRAFT_NOTE: Carry employerRate 0.15 / secondaryThreshold £5,000 / employmentAllowance £10,500. Class 1/2/4 employee rates per Budget.

isaAllowance._DRAFT_NOTE: Standard £20k limit assumed unchanged. Activate cashCapUnder65 from this bundle (announced Autumn Budget 2025).
